title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Adhesives & Allied Products

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Adhesives & Allied Products
jsonLd.description:
We at Adhesives & Allied Products are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Adhesives & Allied Products:
Adhesives & Allied Products is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adhesives & Allied Products!
